type.description: The type of analysis that the job performs.

create_time.description: The time when the job was created.

version.description: The version of Elasticsearch when the job was created.

source_index.description: The name of the source index.

dest_index.description: The name of the destination index.

model_memory_limit.description: The approximate maximum amount of memory resources that are permitted for the job.

state.description: The current status of the job.

failure_reason.description: Messages about the reason why the job failed.

progress.description: The progress report for the job by phase.

assignment_explanation.description: Messages related to the selection of a node.

node.id.description: The unique identifier of the assigned node.

node.name.description: The name of the assigned node.

node.ephemeral_id.description: The ephemeral identifier of the assigned node.

node.address.description: The network address of the assigned node.
